description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a slightly hooked beak. The plumage is predominantly dark brown to gray, with subtle lighter patches and a smooth, matte finish. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is long and tapers to a somewhat pointed end. The head is rounded, with a prominent beak and subtle feather detailing around the eyes and crown. The legs are not clearly visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body. The overall form and feather patterning suggest a bird adapted for perching or gliding, commonly seen in urban parks or on city rooftops.
description: A medium-sized, dark-feathered bird with a streamlined body, hooked beak, and pointed tail, featuring subtle lighter patches on its wings and back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's head, beak, and the full length of its body and tail, with feather details visible along the back.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the bird's folded wings, feather patterning, and the tapering shape of the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's profile, beak, and the smooth transition from head to tail.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the head, beak, and upper body, with the tail receding into the background.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mostly solid with subtle mottling and lighter patches on wings and back
